As re]ards 7 IJl years Saturn, it is an incorrect statement. How
many people. after waiting for a long number of years, get rl\ilrried
dur~g Sade • Sati ! How many get into service only during Sade • Sati.
How many bfing forth children ! Also how many gain by lottery, races
speculations. prize bond etc. The astrologer who attributes any loss
only to 7 lh years of Saturn has not gained sufficient knowledge. So
also his argument to Thritheeya Bral\&spathi alone is to be considered.
As for transit, Saturn, the lord of 12 transited in the constellation
of the lord of 11 to the opponent. Aquarius. i.e .. it is auspidous to the
native. Jupiter was in the constellation of Sun, lord of Lagna which is
advantageous to the person. Sun was in its own constellation.
Hence one i:s to follow the stellar system and analyse by taking the
1"' house as that of the competitor or opponent. Then alone correct
result can be had.
